name: Jitsi Meet
author: Bulwark Mail Community
description: Adds a 'Add Jitsi Meeting' button to calendar events. Admin configures the Jitsi server URL and optional JWT secret via the plugin config page.

jitsi-url.label: Jitsi Server URL
jitsi-url.description: Base URL of your Jitsi Meet instance (e.g. https://meet.example.com)

jitsi-jwt-secret.label: JWT Secret
jitsi-jwt-secret.description: HMAC-SHA256 secret for signing JWTs. Only needed when your Jitsi instance requires JWT authentication. Must match the secret in your Jitsi deployment.
jitsi-jwt-secret.placeholder: Leave empty if JWT is not required

autoAddMeeting.label: Auto-add meeting link
autoAddMeeting.description: Automatically set the meeting link when clicking 'Add Jitsi Meeting'
